display.purpose: Page heroes and the single dominant title per screen.

headline.purpose: Major section headings and editorial card titles.

title.purpose: Functional card/dialog titles where clarity beats voice.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, chips, table headers, metadata.

shadows.name: soft-lift
shadows.purpose: The one ambient shadow: cards, sidebar, sticky topbar, hover.

motion.name: ease-out-soft
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action per screen — pill, burgundy, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #5d0326; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: background .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #380014; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5d0326; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(.96); }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Prominent secondary action in academic gold.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { background: #eac167; color: #251a00; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #f4d896; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #785a02; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: scale(.96); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis utility action on a tonal surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #eff4ff; color: #554245; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(219,192,196,.5); border-radius: 16px; transition: background .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #e6eeff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5d0326; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Raised content surface on the cool field — tonal lift, hairline rose border, one soft shadow.
components.html:
My Courses

Continue where you left off.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(219,192,196,.3); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: box-shadow .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform .2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.3; color: #0b1c30; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #554245; margin: 0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Pill search field with leading icon; border + ring shift to burgundy on focus.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #eff4ff; border: 1px solid rgba(219,192,196,.3); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 10px 16px; transition: border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s; } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: #5d0326; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #5d0326; } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #0b1c30; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: rgba(85,66,69,.6); }

components.name: Active Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar item in its active state — burgundy tint background, deep burgundy text.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; background: #ffd9df; color: #812340; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Soft-tint pill for status — shown here in the brand/program variant.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #ffd9df; color: #812340; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.overview: Spims should feel like the digital equivalent of a well-kept Orthodox academic library: hushed, ordered, and dignified, with light coming in cool and even. Authority is carried by a single deep liturgical burgundy and a restrained academic gold; everything else is calm cool-tinted near-white and generous space. The serif display voice nods to scripture and scholarship; the Inter body keeps the working surfaces of a real software product crisp and legible. Reverence is expressed through restraint and craft — never through applied religious decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Deep burgundy + academic gold on cool near-white (#f8f9ff), not warm cream.
Serif display (Playfair) for headings; Inter for all functional UI.
Extra-rounded shapes (16px default, 24–32px containers), soft single-layer shadows.
Generous whitespace; density only where operators need it.
Pill primary buttons; tonal surface layers instead of hard borders.
RTL-first; logical properties everywhere, mirrored directional icons.

rules.name: The Cool-Field Rule
rules.body: The body background is cool near-white (#f8f9ff), never warm cream/parchment. Warmth is carried by burgundy + gold + typography.

rules.name: The One Burgundy Rule
rules.body: Full-saturation burgundy marks the single most important action or active location per screen — not decoration.

rules.name: The Serif-For-Voice Rule
rules.body: Playfair appears on display and headline levels only; buttons, labels, table cells, and dense UI are Inter.

rules.name: The Arabic-Is-Sans Rule
rules.body: Arabic never uses the Latin serif; all Arabic text is IBM Plex Sans Arabic at 1.7 line-height.

rules.name: The One-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces get at most one soft shadow plus a hairline border; no stacked or dark/tight shadows.

dos: Do keep the body background cool near-white (#f8f9ff); carry warmth through burgundy, gold, and type.
Do reserve full-saturation burgundy for the single primary action / active location per screen.
Do set headings in Playfair and everything functional in Inter; use IBM Plex Sans Arabic for all Arabic.
Do build every interactive component with default / hover / focus-visible / active / disabled / loading states and ≥44px touch targets.
Do convey depth with tonal surface layers + one soft shadow + hairline rose borders.
Do use logical Tailwind utilities (ps/pe, ms/me, start/end) and mirror directional icons.
Do verify AA contrast on both themes; bump muted ink toward #0b1c30 if it's close on a tinted surface.
donts: Don't use warm cream / parchment / sand backgrounds.
Don't apply religious skeuomorphism: no gold-leaf, parchment, faux-stone, ornate Byzantine borders, or candle-glow.
Don't ship legacy-SIS clutter: no dense gray tables, microscopic fonts, or endless nested tabs.
Don't add gamified ed-tech flourishes or corporate-SaaS hero-metric / identical-icon-card-wall templates.
Don't set buttons, labels, table cells, or dense UI in the serif. No serif Arabic.
Don't use pl/pr/ml/mr — logical properties only.
Don't stack shadows or use dark, tight drop-shadows.
Don't decorate with gradient text, glassmorphism-by-default, or colored side-stripe borders.
